title: trifolium productum
intro: Trifolium productum, also known as White Clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. White Clover is rich in flavonoids, coumarins, and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, enhanced cognitive function, and immune system support. Herbal preparations of White Clover include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory conditions.
